sections.title: Active Defects
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND type = Bug AND status != Done

powers.label: Root Cause
powers.prompt: Perform root cause analysis on {key} "{summary}". Identify the likely cause and suggest a fix.

powers.label: Write Test
powers.prompt: Write a test case that would catch the bug described in {key} "{summary}".

sections.title: Sprint Bug Count
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND type = Bug AND sprint in openSprints()

powers.label: QA Report
powers.prompt: Generate a QA quality report for the current sprint in {prefix}. Include bug density, severity distribution, and recommendations.

sections.title: Stories Without Tests
sections.query: project = {prefix} AND type = Story AND sprint in openSprints()

powers.label: Test Plan
powers.prompt: Create a test plan for {key} "{summary}". Include functional, edge case, and integration test scenarios.

powers.label: Generate E2E
powers.prompt: Generate end-to-end test scenarios in Gherkin for {key} "{summary}".
